claim_under_attack: The milestone is not ready to proceed due to three unresolved cross-document contradictions: a throughput SLA gap (50k specified vs. 31k tested), a schema registry dual-ownership conflict, and an unmapped auth dependency blast radius — all three must be resolved before build resumes.
evidence_or_reason: The visible artifact does not establish that all three items are true blockers to resuming build. It explicitly labels the auth dependency as UNKNOWN and admits the throughput test may be optimistic or pessimistic because it used synthetic traffic, so the claimed contradiction is not yet validated against production-shaped demand. It also shows an option to proceed with reduced scope or a temporary lower SLA, which undercuts the stronger claim that every issue must be resolved before any build resumes.
